affiliation.name: Escuela Técnica Superior de Ingenieros Informáticos, Universidad Politécnica de Madrid

description:
This software implements an automated pipeline for
  processing scientific documents using GROBID. 

  It extracts structured TEI XML data from research papers
  and performs analysis including abstract extraction, 

  figure counting, link extraction, and keyword cloud
  generation.


  The project follows open science and research software
  engineering principles, 

  including versioning, DOI assignment, structured metadata,
  and reproducibility practices. 

  It is designed as an educational and research-oriented
  tool for exploring scholarly document processing
  workflows.
name: Software para extracción de documentos científicos mediante el software GROBID
releaseNotes: - Eliminados test unitarios dependientes de GROBID
